reviews.review_description: This was a game that distinguished it from paid tennis game from back then, sadly the company behind this project are now working on robot simulator...

reviews.review_title: Good Game But Cannot Sign In
reviews.review_description: The game recognizes my email address but will Not send me a code to re-enter a new PW. There is No way to contact you.
Genuinely the worst game I've ever played on meta. The serve was awful logging in was difficult. The ai just smashes hits past you can't return. Animation is awful, no physics, AVOID
You can't even make an account without an ID. It's pretty stupid.
The fact that you have to create ANOTHER account just for this game is garbage and is a big red flag, not to mention a huge turnoff for me.
Physics and playability are not great

reviews.review_title: Wont let me make an account
reviews.review_description: I’ve tried all of my actual emails and literally all of them say that an account exists for them but I’ve never used the app. I hate to say it but I also tried fake emails like “literallyneverusedemail@gmail.com” and it said an account existed using that email. I bet it’s a pretty good game but I wouldn’t know because I can’t create an account.
You can’t even make an account says emails are in use but never have been
ITS SO USELESS I THINKED I CAN START AND PLAY NO I NEED MAKE AN ACCOUNT
Downloaded it twice now. Just get the 3 dots and nothing.

They are getting a lot of things right with this game. Baseline forehands and backhands feel realistic against the ball machine but playing against the AI was not. Serving in the Demo seemed fairly real and was better than serving in AI. No real people to play against yet….looking forward to improvements and real folks to play against. Biggest opportunity for improvement based on a first reaction is to add some level grip type or at least angle of racket face (closed or open). As  an example, I couldn’t hit a lob at all no matter how much I opened up the racket face.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your feedback! Great to see that you enjoyed our game. We will consider your opinion to improve our game. If you want to play PVP match, visit our official Discord and try to find a match. Additional feedback is always welcome!
Official Discord : https://discord.gg/ZPKGnUTz

reviews.review_description: Haven’t even played the game yet I think it just came out a couple hours ago, just wanted to say I’m the first review lol

developer_response.body:
Congratulations to be our first reviewer! Try our game someday if you are interested in tennis. Would love to hear your feedbacks :)
Official Discord : https://discord.gg/ZPKGnUTz
